title: Allow the user not to use the data center.
description: If no datacenter is selected, no network volume is set up, users should still be able to select a card and run a pod without a network volume, since we already have to download our image. The only thing left would be downloading the models. Viable for a single-model user. NOT BLOCKED (2026-06-15): the model-download speed-up (aria2c) is already in the current Pod images, so no rebuild gate — app-side work only (no-volume Secure Cloud Pod + downloads to ephemeral container storage), independent of the MPI-81 rebuild batch. We would still use a secure cloud. See brief.md.
